name: WhatsApp delivery workflow skeleton
purpose: Send approved match summaries and onboarding messages through WhatsApp while preserving session history.

nodes.name: Webhook verification
nodes.description: Handles provider verification and inbound status callbacks.

nodes.name: Resolve client session
nodes.description: Finds or creates a WhatsApp session by provider id and mapped client id.

nodes.name: Load approved matches
nodes.description: Reads approved, undelivered matches for a client.

nodes.name: Build template payload
nodes.description: Formats summary text, tender link, deadline, and recommendation into a provider-safe template payload.

nodes.name: Send provider request
nodes.description: Calls WhatsApp Cloud API using environment-managed credentials.

nodes.name: Store message
nodes.description: Persists outbound message id, direction, template metadata, and provider status.

nodes.name: Mark delivered
nodes.description: Updates match delivery state after provider acceptance.
